description_long: This object is a single, elongated leaf with a pale, almost white coloration and subtle greenish undertones. The leaf has a smooth surface with a prominent central vein running from the base to the tip, and faint secondary veins branching outwards. Its edges are gently undulating, and the tip is slightly pointed, while the base tapers into a short, narrow stem. The overall texture appears soft and pliable, typical of fresh foliage. There is no visible pot, soil, or additional plant structure, suggesting this is a detached leaf rather than a full potted plant. The coloration and form are reminiscent of certain indoor ornamental plants, such as peace lilies or rubber plants.
description: A single, elongated pale leaf with a smooth surface, central vein, and subtle greenish-white coloration. No pot or additional plant structure is visible.
description_view_0: A three-quarter view showing the leaf's curvature, central vein, and gently undulating edges.
description_view_1: A side profile highlighting the leaf's thinness and elongated, tapering form.
description_view_2: A top-down view displaying the full length, central vein, and symmetrical shape of the leaf.
description_view_3: An angled view emphasizing the smooth surface and subtle color gradient along the leaf.
